dashboard.subtitle: Your trading performance, in real time.
dashboard.addFirstTrade: Add your first trade to start tracking your progress.

edge.subtitle: The statistical engine that shows you exactly where you make and lose money — by symbol, setup, killzone, day, hour and duration.
edge.emptyTitle: You need at least 10 closed trades in the selected period
edge.emptyDesc: Edge Finder gets more precise as your journal grows. Sync your broker account or add trades — then come back here.
edge.emptyHint: You can also add trades manually, from the Trades page.
edge.summary: Analysis over {count} closed trades. Only patterns with at least 5 occurrences are shown — the rest lack statistical significance.
edge.leaksHint: — this is where you systematically lose money
edge.noEdges: No profitable pattern with a sufficient sample yet.
edge.paywallDesc: The statistical engine that shows you exactly where you make and lose money — by symbol, setup, killzone, day and hour.
edge.pw1: Your profitable edges, statistically proven (min. 5 occurrences)
edge.pw2: The leaks draining your account, identified automatically
edge.pw3: Analysis across 10 dimensions: symbol, setup, killzone, day, hour, duration, tag
edge.pw4: Updates with every new trade in your journal

monteCarlo.title: Monte Carlo Simulator
monteCarlo.subtitle: 10,000 "alternative lives" of your account, built from your REAL returns. Find out the probability of passing a prop firm challenge — before you pay for it.
monteCarlo.emptyTitle: You need at least 10 closed trades
monteCarlo.emptyDesc: The simulation uses the REAL distribution of your results — the more trades in your journal, the more reliable the probabilities.
monteCarlo.emptyHint: After syncing, come back and run the simulation.
monteCarlo.base: Base: {count} real trades · 10,000 simulations · resampling with replacement
monteCarlo.pRuin: risk of hitting {dd}% drawdown (failing the challenge)
monteCarlo.pNeither: neither target nor ruin within {trades} trades
monteCarlo.equityTitle: Where your account ends up after {trades} trades (final equity)
monteCarlo.ddNote: Average max drawdown per simulation: {dd}% · Green = above target · Indigo = in profit · Red = in loss
monteCarlo.disclaimer: ⚠️ The simulation assumes the future statistically resembles your past and that trades are independent. It is not a prediction — it is a risk-understanding tool. Past results do not guarantee future results.
monteCarlo.paywallDesc: Learn the probability of passing a prop firm challenge BEFORE paying for it — based on your real results.
monteCarlo.pw1: 10,000 simulations on the real distribution of your trades
monteCarlo.pw2: Probability of hitting the target vs. risk of failing the challenge
monteCarlo.pw4: Configurable parameters: target, max drawdown, number of trades

billing.title: Subscription & Billing

billing.statusFree: Journal, academy and basic analytics — free forever
billing.f3: Analytics, lot calculator, checklist, calendar, news
billing.f9: Edge Finder — where you win and lose, statistically
billing.f10: Monte Carlo Simulator (prop firm challenge probability)
billing.faq1Body: We never store your card details. Payment, invoices and payment method are managed in the secure Stripe portal.
billing.faq2Body: No contracts, no minimum periods. When you cancel, you keep PRO until the end of the paid period.
billing.faq3Body: Nothing is deleted when you move to Standard: your journal, statistics and Academy progress are waiting exactly as you left them.

alertsPage.title: AI Alerts
alertsPage.subtitle: Intelligent protection against trading mistakes.
alertsPage.configDesc: Enable all alerts for maximum protection. The AI monitors your trading behavior in real time and warns you before you make a costly mistake.
alertsPage.d1: Alert when you exceed your maximum number of trades per day or session.
alertsPage.d2: Automatic detection when you enter emotional trades after a loss.
alertsPage.d3: Alert when the risk per trade exceeds your maximum set percentage.
alertsPage.d4: Notification when the day's losses reach your limit or the prop firm limit.
alertsPage.d5: Alert when you enter trades after big moves without a valid setup.
alertsPage.d6: Notification after 3+ consecutive losses so you take a break.
alertsPage.d7: Alert 30 minutes before major-impact economic events.
alertsPage.d8: Notification when the account drawdown exceeds the set threshold.

checklistPage.title: Pre-Trade Checklist
checklistPage.subtitle: Check your discipline before every entry. Checkmarks reset automatically each day.
items: The HTF trend/structure (H4/D1) supports the trade direction
There's a clear point of interest (Order Block / FVG / liquidity)
I have an entry confirmation (CHoCH / BOS / retest)
The Stop Loss is placed logically (below/above structure), not arbitrarily
Risk per trade respects my rule (≤ 1-2% of the account)
I'm in the right session (London / New York / overlap)
There's no major-impact news in the next 30 min
I'm not trading out of revenge, FOMO or boredom
I'm calm and rested — my mental state is good

signals.title: AI Signals
signals.subtitle: {date} · max 3 high-probability setups
signals.disclaimerTitle: Warning — this is not financial advice
signals.disclaimerBody: Signals are generated by artificial intelligence based on technical analysis and are purely <edu>educational and informational</edu>. They do not constitute financial or investment advice or a recommendation to trade. Trading financial markets involves a <risk>high risk of capital loss</risk>. No signal has a 100% success rate — past performance does not guarantee future results. Do your own analysis, manage your risk and never trade with money you cannot afford to lose. Trading decisions are entirely your own.
signals.analyzing: The AI is analyzing the markets...
signals.analyzingSub: Identifying the best setups of the day. Takes ~10-20 seconds.
signals.emptyBody: The AI did not identify clear enough market conditions. Quality over quantity — sometimes the best trade is to wait.

aiChat.wrLow: Win rate below 45% — analyze with AI
aiChat.pfLow: Profit factor below 1.0 — you are losing money
aiChat.accLoss: Account at a loss vs. deposit
aiChat.tipPf: A low profit factor suggests you let losses run or cut winners too early. Ask the AI about trailing stops.
aiChat.tipWr: A win rate below 50% is fine if R:R is high. Ask the AI to analyze your R:R distribution.
aiChat.tipSolid: Solid performance! Ask the AI which setups should be scaled more aggressively.

accountDialog.eaDesc: Download a small file, place it in MT4/MT5 — trades sync automatically.
accountDialog.metaapiDesc: Connect the account with login + password + server. Automatic cloud sync, no terminal open.
accountDialog.step1Mt4: Place {file} in the MQL4 → Experts folder (MT4 → File → Open Data Folder)
accountDialog.step1Mt5: Place {file} in the MQL5 → Experts folder (MT5 → File → Open Data Folder)
accountDialog.step2: In Navigator, right-click on “Expert Advisors” → Refresh — “TradeGx” appears in the list
accountDialog.step3: Tools → Options → Expert Advisors → check “Allow WebRequest” → add tradegx.com
accountDialog.step4: Drag “TradeGx” from the Navigator onto any chart → a dialog appears → click the “Inputs” tab → paste WebhookURL and AuthToken from the fields above → OK
accountDialog.appearsAuto: The account appears automatically after the first closed trade in {platform}.
accountDialog.credsRequired: Login, password and server are required.
accountDialog.serverHint: Find it in MT4/MT5 → File → Login to Trade Account (the exact server name).
accountDialog.securityNote: For maximum safety use the investor password (read-only) — it allows reading trades without allowing trading. The connection may take 10–30 seconds.
accountDialog.hintMt4: MT4 → Account History → right-click → “Save as Report” → HTML or CSV
accountDialog.hintMt5: MT5 → History → right-click → “Save as Report” → HTML or CSV
accountDialog.hintCtrader: cTrader → History → Closed Positions → Export → CSV
accountDialog.balanceLocked: Auto-synced from MT4/MT5 — the balance comes from the broker and cannot be edited.

backtesting.title: Backtesting
backtesting.subtitle: Test strategies on real historical data — Yahoo Finance live data
backtesting.noBacktestRun: No backtest run. Create a strategy and test it!
backtesting.descEma: 9/21 moving-average crossover with a 200 trend filter. The classic that catches trends.
backtesting.descRsi: Buy oversold, sell overbought — with an EMA 50 filter. For ranging markets.
backtesting.descSession: Breaks the Asia session range at the London open. The intraday favorite.
backtesting.descTrend: Pullback to EMA 50 in a trend confirmed by ADX. Enter only when the trend is real.
backtesting.qtSubtitle: Pick a strategy, a symbol and a period — we run on real historical data in seconds.
backtesting.qtSummary: {preset} · {symbol} · {tf} · {period} · $10,000 account · 1%/trade risk — you can refine everything in the full builder.
backtesting.returnPos: Total return was {val} vs. the initial balance
backtesting.returnNeg: The strategy generated {val} vs. the initial balance

backtestNew.stEmaDesc: Fast/Slow EMA crossover with a long-EMA trend filter. Clear signals, suited for trending markets.
backtestNew.stSessionDesc: Session range breakout (Asian/London/NY). SMC classic — trades the breakout with a directional bias.
backtestNew.stRsiDesc: Mean reversion on RSI oversold/overbought. RSI exits extreme zones → entry in the reversal direction.
backtestNew.stTrendDesc: Trend following with a pullback to EMA + ADX confirmation. Entry when price returns to EMA in a strong trend.
backtestNew.stCustomDesc: You build the rules. Combine any indicators to your own logic — EMA, MACD, Stochastic, Bollinger, RSI, ATR, ADX, DI+/DI−.
backtestNew.stEmaD1: Fast EMA (9) above Slow EMA (21) → BUY
backtestNew.stEmaD2: Optional EMA 200 filter for trend direction
backtestNew.stEmaD3: RSI filter to avoid extreme zones
backtestNew.stEmaD4: Optional MACD confirmation, ATR Stop Loss
backtestNew.stSessionD2: Minimum range filter (pips) for quiet sessions
backtestNew.stSessionD3: Optional retest of the breakout level
backtestNew.stRsiD1: RSI (14) exits the oversold zone (<30) → BUY
backtestNew.stRsiD2: Stochastic confirmation to filter false signals
backtestNew.stRsiD3: Bollinger Bands filter — entry at extremes
backtestNew.stTrendD3: A second slow EMA for confluence
backtestNew.stCustomD1: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands
backtestNew.emaFastD: Signals on crossover with the slow EMA
backtestNew.emaTrendFilterD: 0 = disabled; BUY only if Close > EMA(trendPeriod)
backtestNew.emaRsiFilterD: BUY only if RSI < X (avoids overbought zones)
backtestNew.macdConfirmD: BUY only if MACD(12,26,9) > signal line
backtestNew.trailingStopD: Stop Loss moves with price instead of a fixed SL
backtestNew.sessNote: Asian: 00-09 UTC · London: 07-16 UTC · NY: 12-21 UTC
backtestNew.minRangeD: Skip sessions with too small a range (low volatility)
backtestNew.retestEntryD: Wait for the breakout level retest before entry
backtestNew.sessRsiFilterD: BUY if RSI > (100-X), SELL if RSI < X
backtestNew.oversoldD: Below this RSI level → oversold (BUY signals)
backtestNew.overboughtD: Above this RSI level → overbought (SELL signals)
backtestNew.emaFilterD: Trade BUY only if Close > EMA(n)
backtestNew.stochConfirmD: Requires Stochastic in the matching zone for confirmation
backtestNew.bollFilterD: BUY only when price is below the lower BB band
backtestNew.bollPeriodD: SMA period for Bollinger band calculation
backtestNew.emaPeriodD: Main EMA — the pullback to it triggers entry
backtestNew.adxThresholdD: Enter only if ADX > this threshold (strong trend)
backtestNew.pullbackBarsD: Number of candles in the last pullback toward EMA
backtestNew.emaSlowConfluenceD: A second slower EMA — price must also be above it
backtestNew.requireDiCrossD: Adds directional confirmation from the Directional Index system
backtestNew.macdFilterD: Requires the MACD Line to be above/below the signal line
backtestNew.noCondBuy: No condition — will not generate BUY signals
backtestNew.noCondSell: No condition — will not generate SELL signals
backtestNew.trendFilterD: Trade BUY/SELL only in the trending direction
backtestNew.closeMustBe: Close must be above/below the MA
backtestNew.yahooLive: Data pulled live from Yahoo Finance · {symbol} · {timeframe}
backtestNew.addName: Add a name to the strategy
backtestNew.addCondition: Add at least one BUY or SELL condition

landing.metaDesc: The professional trading journal for SMC and ICT traders. AI Coach, institutional analysis and real-time broker sync.
landing.f1D: Win rate, profit factor, expectancy, Sharpe ratio and 40+ metrics. View your equity curve in real time.
landing.f2D: Real-time psychological monitoring. Detects revenge trading, FOMO and overtrading instantly.
landing.f3D: Tag every setup by type (OB, FVG, BOS, CHoCH), killzone, session and timeframe. Find your real edge.
landing.f4D: Enter your login, investor password and MT4/MT5 server. Automatic import of the last 90 days.
landing.f5D: Configure FTMO, GoatFunded, E8 limits. Automatic alerts before you hit the daily loss limit.
landing.f6D: Compute position size for Forex, Metals, Indices, Crypto, CFD. Precise risk on every entry.
landing.f7D: Full RO/EN course with interactive diagrams: from the first candle to SMC, risk management and professional systems.
landing.f8D: Test 5 ready-made strategies or build your own from 15+ indicators, on real historical data.
landing.f9D: Maximum 3 high-probability signals per day, generated by AI on market structure. With Telegram broadcast.
landing.s1D: Link your MT4/MT5 account directly — login + investor password + server. Automatic import, no CSV files.
landing.s2D: Tag SMC/ICT setups, add emotions and screenshots. AI Coach analyzes instantly.
landing.s3D: Analytics shows exactly which setups, sessions and timeframes bring you consistent profit. Data — not guesses.
landing.c1Text: Hosted in the EU (Frankfurt). Broker connection uses ONLY the investor password (read-only): TradeGx cannot open or close trades and never has access to your funds.
landing.c2Text: TradeGx is an analysis and discipline tool, not a profit scheme. Signals and statistics are educational, not financial advice. Trading involves a real risk of loss.
landing.c3T: Built in public, with real feedback
landing.c3Text: A new product, actively developed, with weekly updates. Suggestions and reported issues reach the founder directly — you can write to us anytime via the contact page.
landing.int3: Your alerts arrive instantly in TradeGx
landing.int5: Alerts, signals and reports on your phone
landing.faq1Q: What happens after the 14-day PRO trial?
landing.faq1A: You move automatically to the Standard plan (free forever): unlimited journal, full Academy, basic analytics, one trading account and 3 backtests per month. No charge without your explicit consent — we don't ask for your card at sign-up.
landing.faq2Q: Does TradeGx have access to my money?
landing.faq2A: No, never. Broker connection uses exclusively the investor password (read-only): we can read your trade history, but it is impossible to open, close or modify positions. Funds stay 100% with your broker.
landing.faq3Q: Are the AI signals investment recommendations?
landing.faq3A: No. All AI features are educational and informational — they do not constitute financial advice. Decisions are yours, and trading involves a real risk of capital loss.
landing.faq4A: Any MT4 or MT5 broker — via our free EA or via MetaAPI (24/7 cloud sync, including FTMO, IC Markets, Pepperstone and hundreds of others). Alternatively: CSV/HTML import or manual entry.
landing.faq5A: In the European Union (Frankfurt), encrypted in transit and at rest, per GDPR. We don't sell anyone's data, and when you delete your account it's gone too. Full details in the Privacy Policy.
landing.faq6A: Yes, in one click, no phone calls and no conditions. You keep PRO access until the end of the paid period, and your data stays intact on the free plan.
landing.heroBadge: 14 days PRO free — no credit card
landing.heroSubtitle: Built for SMC and ICT traders. Direct broker connection, AI Coach, advanced analysis and prop firm alerts — everything you need.
landing.featuresSub: Built from scratch for SMC, ICT and modern institutional traders.
landing.howSub: Three steps to trade with data-driven clarity.
landing.transpTitle: Our commitments, in black and white
landing.transpSub: No fake testimonials and no inflated numbers — only what we concretely guarantee.
landing.intTitle: Connects to what you already use
landing.intSub: Only integrations that work today — no decorative logos.
landing.priceSub: 14 days PRO free at sign-up — no card. Then you choose.
landing.proPriceNote: billed annually · or $19 monthly · cancel anytime
landing.pro5: Weekly AI report · price alerts · TradingView
landing.ctaSub: Join thousands of traders who use TradeGx to journal smarter and improve faster.
landing.ctaNote: Full 14 days PRO · Cancel anytime · No surprises
landing.riskText: TradeGx is a journaling, analysis and education tool — it is not a broker, does not execute trades and does not provide financial or investment advice. Trading financial instruments (forex, CFDs, crypto) involves a significant risk of capital loss and is not suitable for everyone. The statistics shown in presentation materials are illustrative. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
landing.pxSub: Every number, every curve — updated in real time from your trades.
landing.visSub: We don't compare ourselves to anyone. These are the pieces we're building — years ahead of the industry.
landing.vis1D: Your AI clone executes your plan perfectly, in the shadows. The gap between you = the price of indiscipline, in money.
landing.vis2D: We don't predict the market — we predict you. Tilt is detected before the mistake happens.
landing.vis3D: Your trading history as a navigable galaxy: trades as stars, setups as constellations, drawdowns as black holes.
landing.heroCoach: You exited your last 3 GBP/USD trades too early. Let the TP do its job.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. Cancel anytime.
pricing.proDesc: For serious and prop firm traders
pricing.pf12: Edge Finder — statistics of your edges and leaks
pricing.pf17: Prop firm rule alerts (daily loss, drawdown)
pricing.fq1A: After the trial, you're moved automatically to the FREE plan if you don't upgrade. No charge without your consent.
pricing.fq2A: Yes. You can cancel PRO anytime. You keep PRO access until the end of the billing period.
pricing.fq3Q: Do you support prop firm rules?
pricing.fq3A: Yes. You can configure max daily loss, max drawdown and no-trade hours per account. TradeGX alerts you before you break a rule.
pricing.fq4Q: Which brokers are supported for MT5 sync?
pricing.fq4A: Any MT5 broker supported by MetaAPI — including FTMO, MyForexFunds, GoatFunded, IC Markets, Pepperstone and hundreds of others.
pricing.fq5Q: Is there a permanent free plan?
pricing.fq5A: Yes. The FREE plan includes unlimited journal, CSV import, the full Academy (41 lessons with quizzes and certificate), basic analytics, one trading account and 3 backtests per month. No time limit.
pricing.fq6Q: Are the AI signals investment recommendations?
pricing.fq6A: No. Signals and all AI features are exclusively educational and informational — they do not constitute financial advice. Trading decisions are entirely your own, and trading involves a real risk of loss.

about.metaTitle: About TradeGx — who we are and why we build this
about.metaDesc: The TradeGx story: a trading journal built in public, by a Romanian trader, for SMC/ICT traders.
about.title: About TradeGx
about.s1p1: TradeGx started from a simple frustration: existing trading journals are either expensive and generic, or Excel sheets that die after two weeks. None spoke the language of modern traders — Smart Money Concepts, ICT, killzones, order blocks — and none told you what truly matters: exactly where you win and where you lose money, statistically.
about.s1p2: So we built it ourselves. A journal that tags setups the way you think about them, syncs itself with your broker, detects your revenge trading before it burns your account, and shows your real edge from data — not from impressions.
about.s2p1: TradeGx is founded and developed in Romania by Cristian — trader and builder — together with modern AI-assisted development tools. We're not a corporation: we're a small, fast, quality-obsessed product where every user suggestion reaches the person who writes the code directly.
about.s2p2: We're not here to sell you get-rich dreams. We come from the same market you trade — with the same stop losses taken, the same lessons paid for dearly. That's exactly why the platform puts risk management and discipline ahead of any “magic signal”.
about.s3p1: TradeGx develops transparently: updates shipped constantly, a <roadmap>public roadmap</roadmap> of what's coming, and zero fake testimonials on the site. What you see on the <pricing>pricing page</pricing> is exactly what you get — verifiable in the 14-day trial, no card.
about.s4l1: Your data is yours. EU hosting, read-only broker access, zero data selling.
about.s4l2: Education before sales. The full Academy (41 lessons) is free for everyone, forever.
about.s4l3: Statistical honesty. We don't promise profits. Trading involves real risk, and we give you tools to manage it — not guarantees.
about.s4l4: Feedback with the force of law. Features are built from real user requests, not from marketing decks.
about.s5p1: Any question, suggestion or issue: <contact>the contact page</contact> — we usually reply the same day.

roadmap.metaDesc: What we've shipped, what we're building now and what's next. TradeGx develops in public.
roadmap.title: Public roadmap
roadmap.intro: TradeGx is built in public. Here you see exactly what's shipped, what's in progress and what's next — no vague promises. Have an idea? <contact>Tell us</contact> — the most requested features move up the list.
roadmap.sh1: Full journal with SMC/ICT tagging (OB, FVG, BOS, CHoCH, killzones)
roadmap.sh2: Automatic broker sync: free EA MT4/MT5 + MetaAPI cloud 24/7
roadmap.sh3: Dashboard with 40+ metrics, equity curve, streaks
roadmap.sh4: AI Trading Coach + revenge trading / overtrading detection on real trades
roadmap.sh5: AI Signals (HPS) — max 3/day, with Telegram broadcast
roadmap.sh6: Backtesting on real historical data + strategy builder with 15+ indicators
roadmap.sh7: “Test instantly” — backtest in 3 clicks, no setup
roadmap.sh8: TradeGx Academy: 41 lessons RO/EN, 47 diagrams, quizzes + certificate
roadmap.sh9: Edge Finder — your edges and leaks, statistically proven
roadmap.sh10: Monte Carlo Simulator — the probability of passing a prop firm challenge
roadmap.sh12: Price alerts on your watchlist + TradingView webhook
roadmap.sh13: Lot calculator, pre-trade checklist, monthly goals, prop firm monitor
roadmap.sh14: Economic calendar + news classified by impact
roadmap.sh15: PDF export, public trade sharing, community
roadmap.sh17: Command palette (Ctrl+K), premium dark theme, responsive design
roadmap.sh18: Achievements & discipline streaks — computed from your real data
roadmap.sh19: AI Vision — AI analysis sees the charts attached to the trade (structure, entry, SL)
roadmap.sh20: Full bilingual RO/EN interface — the entire site and app, word for word
roadmap.ip1: New broker integrations: cTrader, TradeLocker, DXtrade
roadmap.pl1: Native push notifications on your phone (with the app closed)
roadmap.pl3: Community leaderboard with a track record verified from sync
roadmap.pl7: Additional integrations and automations on community request
roadmap.sh21: Tax reports for Romania — annual summary (net result, estimated tax) + PDF export
roadmap.sh22: Two-factor authentication (2FA) with authenticator app + backup codes
roadmap.pl8: MAE/MFE + R-multiples analytics — see where your stops are too tight, in the language of professional risk management
roadmap.pl9: Institutional metrics: Sharpe, Sortino, Calmar, expectancy + aggregated portfolio view across all accounts
roadmap.pl10: Full multi-asset: direct crypto exchange connections (read-only Binance/Bybit API keys), futures and stocks
roadmap.pl11: Annual plan with discount + automatic VAT invoices (Stripe Tax) for customers across the European Union
roadmap.pl12: Interactive onboarding with demo data + step-by-step guide to your first imported trade
roadmap.pl13: Light mode + full accessibility (WCAG): contrast, keyboard navigation, screen readers
roadmap.pl14: Customizable dashboard — rearrangeable widgets, your cockpit exactly the way you want it
roadmap.pl15: Proactive AI Coach: real-time revenge-trading detection, “what-if” analysis on your own history, longitudinal memory
roadmap.pl16: In-house market data infrastructure (candle cache + professional provider) + 24/7 monitoring and automated tests on every calculation
roadmap.visionH: 🔮 The Vision — years ahead of the industry
roadmap.visionIntro: The whole industry builds tools to see the market better. We are building the mirror that sees you. The market cannot be predicted — the trader can.
roadmap.vs1: The Digital Twin — your AI clone executing your plan perfectly, in the shadows, in parallel with you; the gap between your equity curves = the exact price of indiscipline, in money
roadmap.vs2: The Trading Firewall — AI that doesn't predict the market, it predicts you: detects tilt from your own patterns before the mistake happens and triggers a cooling-off period
roadmap.vs3: The 3D Universe — your trading history as a navigable galaxy: trades are stars, setups are constellations, drawdowns are black holes; fly through your career
roadmap.vs4: The War Room — a council of AI mentors with opposing personalities (trend follower, scalper, risk manager) debating your trade live, before you enter
roadmap.vs5: Biometrics — correlating smartwatch heart rate and HRV with your decisions: discover what your body knew before you did
roadmap.vs6: Market Weather — market state as a living 3D weather map: volatility storms, liquidity tides, sentiment winds — an entirely new visual language
roadmap.vs7: The VR Room (WebXR) — put on the headset and step into your spatial terminal: analytics floating around you, the 3D universe above
roadmap.vs8: Hands-free voice journaling — speak during the trade; AI transcribes, classifies the emotion and links it to the trade automatically
roadmap.vs9: The Trader's Autobiography — after years of data, AI writes your story: chapters, turning points, yearly letters to your future self
roadmap.vs10: The News Guardian — knows your open positions and the economic calendar: warns you 15 minutes before major news hits a symbol you're exposed to
roadmap.vs11: The Ulysses Contract — write your rules while calm and sign them digitally; when AI detects a breach, it shows you your own contract, with your own signature
roadmap.vs12: The Trader Credit Score — a discipline score (not a profit score!) computed only from synced, verifiable data: your passport to prop firms and funding
roadmap.vs13: The Market Genome — pattern-matching on historical regimes: “today looks 87% like March 14, 2023 — here's how YOU traded it back then”
roadmap.vs15: The Black Box — after a blown account, AI produces an aviation-style crash investigation: the flight timeline, the fatal decision, contributing factors and recommendations so it never repeats
roadmap.vs25: The Daily Ritual — a command center that greets you every morning with your personal briefing (news on your pairs, the day's focus from AI Coach, market sessions) and keeps you hooked through a discipline streak you don't want to break: the fear of losing your progress brings you back every day

contactPage.metaDesc: Contact the TradeGx team: support, feedback, security issue reporting.
contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: TradeGx is a new, actively developed product — every message reaches the founder directly. We usually reply the same day.
contactPage.secDesc: Found a vulnerability? Write to us with the subject [SECURITY] — we handle responsible reports with top priority. Details also in /.well-known/security.txt.
contactPage.fbDesc: A missing feature? A bug? Tell us exactly what happened and on which device — we build in public, and user suggestions go straight into the development plan.
contactPage.timeDesc: Usually the same day, at most 48 business hours. GDPR requests (data access/deletion) are processed with priority.
contactPage.idP: The TradeGx platform is operated from Romania. Full details about data processing are in the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>, and the terms of use in the <terms>Terms & Conditions</terms>.

terms.metaDesc: The terms and conditions for using the TradeGx platform.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.s1p1: TradeGx (www.tradegx.com) is a SaaS software platform for journaling, analyzing and improving trading activity (trade journal). The platform provides trade record-keeping tools, performance statistics, educational materials, risk management tools and AI-assisted features.
terms.s1p2: TradeGx is NOT a broker, dealer, bank or investment firm. The platform does not execute trades, does not hold or manage user funds and does not intermediate access to financial markets.
terms.s2p1: All platform content — including AI-generated signals, statistics, reports, Academy materials and AI assistant responses — is exclusively informational and educational. Nothing in TradeGx constitutes financial, investment, legal or tax advice and does not represent a recommendation to buy or sell any financial instrument.
terms.s2p2: Trading decisions are entirely your own. Trading financial instruments involves a significant risk of capital loss.
terms.s3p1: Using the platform requires an account. You are responsible for keeping your login credentials confidential and for all activity carried out in your account. You must be at least 18 years old to use TradeGx.
terms.s3p2: Connecting to broker accounts (MT4/MT5) is done exclusively via the investor password (read-only) or equivalent read-access mechanisms. We will never ask for your main trading password.
terms.s4p1: Certain features are available for a subscription, according to the offer shown on the pricing page. The free trial (if offered) does not require a credit card and does not automatically convert into a paid subscription without your explicit consent.
terms.s4p2: Payments are processed by specialized third-party providers. You can cancel your subscription anytime from account settings; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
terms.s5intro: You are prohibited from using the platform for:
terms.s5l2: attempts at unauthorized access to TradeGx systems or other users' accounts;
terms.s5l3: copying, reselling or redistributing platform content without written consent;
terms.s5l4: uploading content that infringes third-party rights.
terms.s6p1: The platform, code, design, the TradeGx brand and educational materials are protected by intellectual property law. The data you enter (trades, notes, screenshots) remains yours; you grant us only the technical license needed to store and display it within the service.
terms.s7p1: The service is provided “as is”. To the maximum extent permitted by law, TradeGx is not liable for financial losses resulting from your trading decisions, for the accuracy of third-party data (quotes, economic calendar, news) or for temporary service interruptions. Broker sync depends on third-party services and may experience delays.
terms.s8p1: You can delete your account anytime from settings. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms, with prior notice where reasonably possible.
terms.s9p1: We may update these terms; significant changes will be announced in the app. Continuing to use the service after changes take effect means you accept them. These terms are governed by Romanian law and applicable EU regulations.
terms.s10p1: For any question about these terms: <mail>palcristi1@gmail.com</mail> or the <contact>contact</contact> page.

privacy_page.metaDesc: How TradeGx collects, uses and protects your data (GDPR).
privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.s1p1: This policy explains how the TradeGx platform (www.tradegx.com) collects, uses and protects personal data, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR). The data controller is the operator of the TradeGx platform; you can contact us at <mail>palcristi1@gmail.com</mail>.
privacy_page.s2l1: Account data: name, email address, password (stored exclusively encrypted/hashed).
privacy_page.s2l2: Trading data: trades entered manually, imported or synced from your broker (symbol, prices, volumes, profit/loss), journal notes, uploaded screenshots.
privacy_page.s2l3: Broker connection data: for sync we use exclusively read-only access (investor password); credentials needed for integrations are stored encrypted.
privacy_page.s2l4: Technical data: minimal server logs needed for security and operation (IP address, browser type).
privacy_page.s2p: We don't collect more data than needed to operate the service (the minimization principle).
privacy_page.s3Title: 3. What we use the data for
privacy_page.s3l1: providing the service (journal, statistics, alerts, reports) — basis: performance of the contract;
privacy_page.s3l2: AI features (analysis, signals, coach) — relevant statistical data is sent on a case-by-case basis to the AI provider to generate the response — basis: performance of the contract;
privacy_page.s3l3: notifications you enable yourself (Telegram, push, email) — basis: consent;
privacy_page.s3l4: security and abuse prevention — basis: legitimate interest.
privacy_page.s3p: We do not sell or rent your data to anyone.
privacy_page.s4p1: The database is hosted in the European Union (Frankfurt region, Germany). The app runs on cloud infrastructure with encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and encryption at rest.
privacy_page.s5intro: We use a limited number of providers to run the service:
privacy_page.s5l4: Telegram — only if you enable Telegram notifications;
privacy_page.s5l5: MetaApi — only if you enable cloud broker sync;
privacy_page.s6p1: Account data is kept for as long as the account is active. When you delete your account, personal data is deleted or anonymized within a reasonable timeframe, except where the law requires it to be kept.
privacy_page.s7p1: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure (“the right to be forgotten”), restriction, portability and objection, as well as the right to withdraw your consent anytime. To exercise them, write to us at <mail>palcristi1@gmail.com</mail>. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the ANSPDCP (www.dataprotection.ro).
privacy_page.s8p1: TradeGx uses only strictly necessary cookies: the session cookie for authentication. We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies. Interface preferences (theme, language, Academy progress) are stored locally in your browser (localStorage) and never leave your device.
privacy_page.s9p1: We will announce any significant change to this policy in the app before it takes effect.

tips.text: Never risk more than 1–2% of your account on a single trade.
Move your stop-loss to break-even once the trade reaches +1R profit.
With a 1:2 Risk:Reward you're profitable even with just a 40% win rate.
Check the trend on the higher timeframe (H4/D1) before entering on the lower one.
Avoid entries 30 minutes before and after high-impact news.
Never add to a losing position — that's how you blow up your account.
Calculate your position size BEFORE entering, starting from your stop-loss.
Place your stop-loss below/above structure, not at an arbitrary fixed distance.
A 50% loss requires a 100% gain to recover. Limit your losses.
If you lose 2–3 trades in a row, stop for the day. Protect your capital.
Wait for confirmation (CHoCH / BOS) — don't enter just because price hit a zone.
The London session (10:00–13:00 RO) offers the highest liquidity on forex.
The New York killzone (15:30–18:00 RO) is ideal for indices and USD pairs.
Win rate alone means nothing — what matters is expectancy: (win rate × R:R) − loss rate.
Never trade without a stop-loss, no matter how confident you are in the setup.
A Fair Value Gap tends to get filled — use it as an entry zone with confluence.
Liquidity builds up above obvious highs and below obvious lows (equal highs/lows).
A valid Order Block created a move with displacement, not just any candle.
Journal every trade — without data you can't objectively improve anything.
Take partial profit at +1R and let the rest run with the stop at break-even.
Don't open two strongly correlated positions — it's hidden double risk in the same direction.
Reduce your position size when volatility (ATR) rises significantly.
Trade in the direction of the trend — don't try to catch tops and bottoms.
A healthy trend forms higher highs and higher lows.
Backtest a strategy on at least 100 trades before using it live.
The spread widens at session opens and closes — avoid those moments.
Confluence of several factors (trend + HTF zone + session) raises the probability.
Gold (XAU) is more volatile than most forex pairs — widen your stop-loss.
Avoid trading Friday afternoons: low liquidity, unpredictable moves.
Check the economic calendar every morning, before opening a position.
Always risk the same percentage of your account — don't increase your stake to recover a loss.
Price reacts to the levels everyone sees — draw the zones from H4/D1.
